home_section.description: Crafting intelligent, scalable systems that merge robust engineering with cutting-edge AI capabilities. Specialized in building production-grade applications.

projects_section.title: Featured Production Systems
projects_section.paragraph: Organic collection of sophisticated architectures and AI-driven solutions built for scale and performance.

project_1.title: VidWhisper Engine
project_1.description: An AI-powered web platform that automatically transcribes video and audio files using OpenAI Whisper. Features background processing, multi-language support, and a fully responsive dashboard.
project_1.demo_video: Watch a video demonstration of the VidWhisper Engine project.

project_2.title: Vehicle Rental Platform
project_2.description: Application for fleet management and vehicle rental. Availability check, booking system, and admin panel.

project_3.title: Tech Stack Showcase
project_3.description: Interactive grid of core competencies and technologies. Next.js • React • Node.js • Python • FastAPI • PostgreSQL • Docker • Prisma

project_4.title: Media Platform and Live Streaming Infrastructure
project_4.description: Full-stack media platform with live streaming capabilities via RTMP/HLS, digital asset management through a custom CMS with complete CRUD functionality, dynamic publishing, and secure user authentication.
